description.value:
This improved version of the Fifth Dance is the Dancer's strongest technique, used to decimate enemies. This technique can only be used while the user is in the Meimu no Kamae stance. Much like the previous technique, the dancer appears in front of all subjects in the affected area, the dance steps quicken until each make a contact with the targets, that to them seems real. Each target in the area takes 4d6 damage, which can be halved with a successful will save. All enemies in range that are farther than 30 ft. receive a +2 bonus to this save. The user of this technique is considered to be moving at 2 speed ranks higher than actually.

Requires: Taijutsu 15 ranks; Meimu no Kamae(t)

Material Focus: To accurately perform this technique, the user needs specially made clothes, usually equipped with whistles or bells that cause the illusion. These clothes usually have a Cost DC of 10.

Mastery: At the third step of mastery, for 4 chakra, the user can increase the damage by 1d6.

At the fifth step of mastery, for every 4 chakra, the user can increase the damage by 1d6 to a max of 2d6.
